title: [Bug]: pip install fails on macOS with externally-managed-environment when setting up ESP-IDF
body:
Hi, trying to set up esphome.cloud locally. I'm on macOS 14.5 (M2 MacBook Air). Followed the README, but `pip install -r requirements.txt` fails with:

```
error: externally-managed-environment
× This environment is externally managed
```

My Python is from Homebrew (`python3.11`). Same error if I try `pip3` directly. Searched the Issues but didn't find anything specific to macOS + Homebrew + ESP-IDF setup. Is there a recommended workflow?
